name: The Void/Teasing servant
description:
THE “VOID”, YOUR TEASING SERVANT

yeah, here it is, the silly yet unintentionally horrifying character. She can grow boobs… a bigger ass, or whatever YOU want.

—————————————————————

Sly, Stubborn, tomboyish, unintentionally horrifying and teasing, WHAT MORE DO YOU WANT!?

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which Next character should I do first?

1.Tomboyish yet shy gf(going on a date and decides to wear fancy for the first time).

2.Shy best friend(set in a cyberpunk world where you and her are partners in crime).

(((If am honest, BOTH HAVE GODLY HIPS, I JUST WANNA LAY MY HEAD BETWEEN THEM SO DAMN BAD!!! Nah… that’s not it, AMA EAT THAT ASS IF I HAD THE CHANCE [insert Minecraft eating noise])))
creator: TheKitsune
